title: Internal error when assigning integer array parameter

features.name: unpacked array parameter assigned with array literal in override
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array parameter being assigned an array literal directly in a module instantiation parameter override
features.snippet:
module foo #(parameter int unsigned VAL[2] = '{1, 2}); endmodule
module top(); foo #(.VAL('{1, 2})) inst(); endmodule
